headline: Caterpillar Expands AI Machinery And Low Carbon Power Story For Investors
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) introduced a concept heavy duty pickup truck with AI driven features, broadening its vehicle portfolio. The company entered the compact utility loader market with the new TUL100 model. At CONEXPO, Caterpillar expanded its showcase of autonomous and AI technologies for construction applications. Caterpillar announced a partnership focused on large scale lower carbon power generation and carbon storage solutions for mission critical infrastructure. Caterpillar is best...

headline: Compact Construction Equipment Company Evaluation Report: Caterpillar, Doosan Bobcat and Kubota Strengthen Leadership with Electrified Machinery, Autonomous Technologies and Manufacturing Expansion
summary: The Compact Construction Equipment Companies Quadrant offers a detailed industry analysis of the global compact construction equipment market. This report evaluates over 100 companies, identifying the Top 17 as quadrant leaders due to their innovations and market strategies. Growth is fueled by investments in residential, non-residential, and commercial sectors, with a notable shift towards electric equipment in Europe and North America. headline: Here Are the Stocks Dragging the Dow Lower
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average was underperforming other major indexes midday Thursday, losing around 1.6%, or more than 700 points. The biggest reasons? Falling shares of Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar and Sherwin-Williams.

content.title: Here Are the Stocks Dragging the Dow Lower
content.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average was underperforming other major indexes midday Thursday, losing around 1.6%, or more than 700 points. The biggest reasons? Falling shares of Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar and Sherwin-Williams.

headline: CalAmp To Appoint Maurizio Iperti as CEO Following Another Year of Strong Financial and Operational Performance
summary: Generated $41 Million of Free Cash Flow in 2025 Entered 2026 with $64 Million of Cash and No Debt Earned Caterpillar’s Supplier Excellence Certification for Second Consecutive Year CARLSBAD, Calif., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CalAmp, a leading telematics company providing products and solutions that help organizations worldwide monitor, track, and protect their vital assets, today announced that Maurizio Iperti will become Chief Executive Officer. headline: Oil Prices Surge, Stocks Fall on Widening Iran War
summary: A new surge in oil prices sent stocks lower, extending moves that have rippled through financial markets and threatened to set off convulsions in the world economy.  The widening war in the Middle East has forced a de facto closure of the Strait of Hormuz, trapping thousands of ships in the Persian Gulf while forcing Gulf oil producers to slash output and Asian refiners to hunt for alternative supplies.  Iran’s unconfirmed claim that it hit an American oil tanker with a missile added to the supply concerns.
